steps.t: Mekhnet has been keeping an eye on the opposite shoreline to the east of the the Kambráda encampment in Amdân. You should check to see if anything str…
You have found nothing of note other than an inert sapper-bomb. Perhaps inspecting it will unlock more clues.
Mekhnet waits near the Kambráda encampment in the eastern part of Amdân. She will want to hear about the goblin-sapper and the bomb you found.
